pages.text: 咘咘已经是大宝宝了，可是她还穿着尿片。每次妈妈说"咘咘，我们去坐小马桶吧？"咘咘就摇头："不要不要！"
pages.text_en: Bubu was already a big girl, but she still wore diapers. Every time Mommy said, "Bubu, shall we try the potty?" Bubu shook her head: "No, no!"

pages.text: 小马桶是粉色的，上面还有小兔子的图案。可是咘咘觉得它好奇怪，不想坐上去。
pages.text_en: The potty was pink with little bunny pictures on it. But Bubu thought it looked strange and didn’t want to sit on it.

pages.text: 豆豆来找咘咘玩。"咘咘，我已经不穿尿片啦！我会自己去坐小马桶，可厉害了！"
pages.text_en: Doudou came to play with Bubu. "Bubu, I don’t wear diapers anymore! I can use the potty all by myself. It’s so cool!"

pages.text: 慢慢也说："我也会哦。虽然我走得慢，但是每次想上厕所，我就慢慢走过去坐好。"
pages.text_en: Manman said too: "I can use the potty as well. Even though I walk slowly, I just take my time and sit down when I need to go."

pages.text: 咘咘有点着急了："可是……我不知道什么时候该去坐呀。"
pages.text_en: Bubu was a little worried: "But… I don’t even know when I’m supposed to go."

pages.text: Sam 爸爸笑着说："没关系，爸爸教你。我们每隔一会儿就去坐一下小马桶，坐一小会儿就好，不用急。"
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam smiled and said: "It’s okay, I’ll teach you. Let’s try sitting on the potty every little while, just for a short time. No need to rush."

pages.text: 第一次，咘咘只是看了看小马桶。爸爸说："很好！看一看也是进步。"
pages.text_en: The first time, Bubu only looked at the potty. Daddy said: "That’s great! Even looking at it is progress."

pages.text: 第二次，咘咘摸了摸小马桶。妈妈说："真棒！摸一摸也是进步。"
pages.text_en: The second time, Bubu touched the potty. Mommy said: "Wonderful! Even touching it is progress."

pages.text: 第三次，咘咘终于坐上去了！只坐了一小会儿，但是——"我坐上去啦！"咘咘好开心。
pages.text_en: The third time, Bubu finally sat on it! She didn’t stay long, but still—"I did it!" Bubu was so happy.

pages.text: NOMI 做了一张小贴纸表。每次咘咘坐小马桶，就可以贴一颗星星。
pages.text_en: NOMI made a sticker chart. Every time Bubu used the potty, she got to stick a star on the chart.

pages.text: 早上起床，坐一下小马桶。吃完饭，坐一下小马桶。出门之前，也坐一下。
pages.text_en: In the morning after waking up—potty time. After eating—potty time. Before going out—potty time.

pages.text: 有时候坐上去什么也没有。爸爸说："没关系，下次再试。"咘咘点点头："下次再试！"
pages.text_en: Sometimes, nothing happened. Daddy said: "That’s okay. Let’s try again next time." Bubu nodded: "Next time!"

pages.text: 有时候——成功啦！咘咘高兴得跳起来："我做到了我做到了！"
pages.text_en: Sometimes—success! Bubu jumped up and cheered: "I did it, I did it!"

pages.text: 贴纸表上的星星越来越多了。一颗、两颗、三颗……哇，快要贴满了！
pages.text_en: The sticker chart started filling up with stars. One star, two stars, three stars…soon, it was almost full!

pages.text: 慢慢地，咘咘越来越厉害了。想上厕所的时候，她会自己说："我要去坐小马桶！"然后自己走过去。
pages.text_en: Slowly but surely, Bubu got better and better. Whenever she needed to go, she’d announce: "I need to use the potty!" and went on her own.

pages.text: Tina 妈妈帮咘咘穿上了漂亮的小内裤，粉色的，上面有小星星。"不用穿尿片啦！咘咘长大了！"
pages.text_en: Mommy Tina helped Bubu put on some pretty little starry pink underwear. "No more diapers! Bubu is such a big girl now!"

pages.text: 咘咘笑得好开心。原来长大就是这样的呀——慢慢来，一步一步，每一次都是进步。记得哦：隔一会儿就去坐一下小马桶，坐一坐就好，不用急！
pages.text_en: Bubu laughed so happily. So this is what growing up feels like—little by little, step by step, every try is progress. Remember: Take a little potty time every now and then. No rush!
